organization.summary: GitHub Copilot 生态并非单一 Marketplace，而是四条并行扩展链路：IDE/Web 的 Copilot Extensions（GitHub App，@ 提及调用）、Copilot CLI 的 Git-repo Plugin Marketplaces（agents/skills/hooks/MCP 打包）、跨表面的 MCP Registry（连接层目录）、以及 VS Code Extension 的 chatSkills 贡献点。与 Cursor Marketplace 的「统一插件 bundle」不同，Copilot 将「Chat 扩展（GitHub App）」与「CLI 插件（原语包）」刻意分离。

layers.name: Copilot Extensions
layers.surface: VS Code / Visual Studio / JetBrains / github.com / Mobile
layers.install: GitHub Marketplace 安装 GitHub App → IDE 启用

layers.name: GitHub MCP Registry
layers.surface: IDE / CLI / Copilot App / Cloud Agent / Code Review
layers.note: 原始 MCP 服务发现，非完整 CLI Plugin bundle
layers.install: 按编辑器/CLI 配置 MCP server

layers.name: VS Code Extension Skills
layers.note: 开放 Agent Skills 标准，扩展可贡献 SKILL.md

policies: Default Off / On / Required for team plugins

insights.title: 双轨生态：Extensions ≠ CLI Plugins
insights.body: Copilot Extensions（1272 个 GitHub App）面向 IDE Chat 的 @ 工具集成，以 Skillsets（API 端点）或 Agents（全控交互）实现；CLI Plugins（官方 11 + 社区 96）面向终端 Agent，原语结构与 Cursor Plugin 高度同构（agents/skills/hooks/MCP）。

insights.title: Extensions 主战场是 DevOps 流水线，不是 SaaS 知识包
insights.body: Marketplace Copilot Extensions 中 Other(922)、CI/CD & DevOps(112)、Security & Quality(109) 占比最高——与 Cursor Marketplace（大量 SaaS Skills 说明书）形成鲜明对比。Copilot Extension 的典型价值是「在 PR/Issue 上下文中触发已有 GitHub App 能力」，而非向 Agent 注入 50 份 API 场景文档。

insights.title: CLI 侧 Skills 密集，但组织方式不同
insights.body: awesome-copilot 仓库含 381 个 SKILL.md、221 个 .agent.md（共享池 + 96 个 plugin 清单），Skills 数量级接近 Cursor，但大量 Skills 位于仓库根 skills/ 目录而非 per-plugin 拆分；copilot-plugins 官方仓仅 11 个插件，偏微软/GitHub 战略合作（WorkIQ、Fabric、Advanced Security）。

insights.title: MCP 是第三层连接目录
insights.body: GitHub MCP Registry 现有 110 个登记服务（含 github-mcp-server、playwright、azure、notion 等），与 CLI Plugin Marketplace 独立——开发者可先发现 MCP，再决定是否打包为完整 Plugin。GitHub 内置 MCP server 支持 toolset 裁剪以优化 Agent 工具选择精度。

insights.title: 与 Cursor Marketplace 的战略差异
insights.body: Cursor：统一 Marketplace + 人工审核 + per-plugin Skills 细分（SaaS 集成导向）。GitHub Copilot：Extensions 走 GitHub App 生态（~600+ 既有集成复用）、CLI 走开源 marketplace.json 联邦、MCP 走开放注册表——三层分工而非一层打包，因此「组件统计」需在对应层分别解读。

manifest.description: Community-driven collection of GitHub Copilot plugins, agents, prompts, and skills

plugins.name: acreadiness-cockpit
plugins.description: Drive Microsoft AgentRC from Copilot chat: assess AI readiness, generate Copilot instructions (flat or nested with applyTo globs for monorepos), and manage policies. Produces a self-contained static HTML dashboard at reports/index.html.

plugins.name: agent-council
plugins.description: A runtime-portable 5-agent quality gate that adjudicates text artifacts before they ship. Five role-conditioned LLM deliberators run a 2-round async protocol with cross-read rebuttal and return one verdict — SHIP, REVISE, or HOLD — plus a structured revision brief and a full audit transcript.

plugins.name: ai-ready
plugins.description: Analyze any repository and generate AI-ready configuration — AGENTS.md, copilot-instructions.md, CI workflows, issue templates, and more. Mines your PR review patterns and creates files customized to your stack.

plugins.name: ai-team-orchestration
plugins.description: Bootstrap and run a multi-agent AI development team with named roles (Producer, Dev Team, QA). Sprint planning, brainstorm prompts with distinct agent voices, cross-chat context survival, and parallel team workflows. Based on a proven template that shipped a 30-game app in 5 days with zero human-written code.

plugins.name: arize-ax
plugins.description: Arize AX platform skills for LLM observability, evaluation, and optimization. Includes trace export, instrumentation, datasets, experiments, evaluators, AI provider integrations, annotations, prompt optimization, and deep linking to the Arize UI.

plugins.name: automate-this
plugins.description: Record your screen doing a manual process, drop the video on your Desktop, and let Copilot CLI analyze it frame-by-frame to build working automation scripts. Supports narrated recordings with audio transcription.

plugins.description: Meta prompts that help you discover and generate curated GitHub Copilot agents, instructions, prompts, and skills.

plugins.description: Comprehensive AWS cloud development tools including Infrastructure as Code, serverless functions, architecture patterns, and cost optimization for building scalable cloud applications.

plugins.description: Comprehensive Azure cloud development tools including Infrastructure as Code, serverless functions, architecture patterns, and cost optimization for building scalable cloud applications.

plugins.description: A comprehensive collection of specialized agents for software analysis, impact assessment, structural quality advisories, and architectural review using CAST Imaging.

plugins.description: Reliable automation, in-depth debugging, and performance analysis in Chrome using Chrome DevTools and Puppeteer.

plugins.name: clojure-interactive-programming
plugins.description: Tools for REPL-first Clojure workflows featuring Clojure instructions, the interactive programming chat mode and supporting guidance.

plugins.name: cms-development
plugins.description: Skills for CMS development across themes, plugins, admin tooling, media workflows, markdown rendering, and static export pipelines.

plugins.name: context-engineering
plugins.description: Tools and techniques for maximizing GitHub Copilot effectiveness through better context management. Includes guidelines for structuring code, an agent for planning multi-file changes, and prompts for context-aware development.

plugins.name: context-matic
plugins.description: Coding agents hallucinate APIs. ContextMatic gives them curated, versioned API and SDK docs. Ask your agent to "integrate the payments API" and it guesses — falling back on outdated training data and generic patterns that don't match your actual SDK. ContextMatic solves this by giving the agent deterministic, version-aware, SDK-native context at the exact moment it's needed.

plugins.name: copilot-goal-skill
plugins.description: Goal-driven task orchestration with independent verification. Interviews the user to define a clear goal, then loops between a Builder subagent (does the work) and an Inspector subagent (judges the result with fresh context). The Inspector never trusts the Builder. Output is auditable in git commits from each subagent actions. Use when the user says "achieve this goal", "make this work", "implement until done", or wants verified autonomous task completion with independent quality review.
